analysis.summary: The technician performed an uninstall and reinstall of Google Chrome on a Windows 10 machine. This included using Microsoft Edge to download Chrome, setting Chrome as the default web browser, and concluding the session with a system restart.
actions_taken: Logged into the client's Windows 10 computer.
Uninstalled Google Chrome using Programs and Features in the Control Panel.
Launched Microsoft Edge and completed its initial setup.
Downloaded and installed Google Chrome via Microsoft Edge.
Set Google Chrome as the default web browser in Windows Settings.
issues_resolved: Reinstalled Google Chrome, potentially resolving any prior issues with the browser.
Ensured Google Chrome was set as the default web browser.

tech_performance.efficiency_notes: The technician worked very methodically and efficiently, proceeding directly through the steps of uninstalling, reinstalling, and configuring Google Chrome without any visible hesitation or detours.
